title: On A Window At The Four Crosses In The Watling-Street Road, Warwickshire (Epigrams On Windows)
content:
Fool, to put up four crosses at your door,
    Put up your wife, she's CROSSER than all four.
meaning:
"On A Window At The Four Crosses In The Watling-Street Road, Warwickshire (Epigrams On Windows)" is a quintessential example of Jonathan Swift's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
